ai_assistantsv1Assistant.description: An AI Employee available on an account.

assistantId.description:
The canonical id of the AI Employee (format: "ASSISTANT-XXXX"). This is the
id used to address the AI Employee across Vendasta's AI APIs, such as
scoping knowledge to it through the AI Knowledge API.

assistantType.description:
The kind of AI Employee. Distinguishes otherwise similarly-named AI
Employees and is stable to branch on.

name.description: The display name of the AI Employee.

v1ListAssistantsRequest.description: Request to list the AI Employees on an account.

accountGroupId.description:
The account group whose AI Employees to list (format: "AG-XXXXXXXXXX").
The calling partner must own this account.

partnerId.description:
The partner namespace whose AI Employees to list. Must be the calling
partner's own partner id.

v1ListAssistantsResponse.description: A page of AI Employees with pagination metadata.

assistants.description: The AI Employees on this page.

cursor.description: Optional. An opaque token from a previous response's next_cursor to retrieve the next page of results. Omit or leave empty for the first page.

pageSize.description: Optional. The maximum number of items to return per page.

hasMore.title: Whether or not more results exist

nextCursor.title: A cursor that can be provided to retrieve the next page of results

totalResults.title: The total number of results. This is not supported on all paged apis and will be 0 if it is not supported

scopes.ai-assistant: Allows the application to manage your AI assistants
scopes.ai-assistant:read: Allows the application view-only access to your AI Assistants

info.description: Discover the AI Employees on your accounts.
info.title: AI Employees

post.description:
List the AI Employees on an account, with pagination.

Required OAuth2 scopes: `ai-assistant` or `ai-assistant:read`

requestBody.description: Request to list the AI Employees on an account.
